meta.name: Jaehyun Ko (Jay Ko)
meta.title: AI Product Leader
meta.subtitle: 6+ Years | Tabular ML -> Vision -> LLM Agent -> Motion AI

summary: AI Product Leader focused on applying AI to new domains, shipping products, and scaling teams. From strategy to architecture and execution, I run end-to-end product outcomes with measurable business impact.

highlights: Designed a LangChain-based Film Agent and delivered LLM-to-Unreal E2E integration

Built the MOAI evaluation platform and accelerated model-to-product cycle: 2 integrations in 2 years before adoption -> 2 integrations in 5 months after adoption (Locomotion, Text-to-Motion), with 6 user studies
Introduced an external model routing platform, cutting integration cycle from weekly cadence to near-instant deployment; designed architecture and APIs for I2V, I2I, TTS, and Music Gen
Led the AI track in CineV launch strategy (official launch in January 2026)
Built and led an AIaaS business unit from zero to 20 people
Scaled MRR from KRW 5M to KRW 52M (10x) and won 12 new enterprise clients
Launched two services from 0 to 1: Long-to-Short AI video editor and shopping assistant chatbot
Improved operations of a family HR consulting business and supported turnaround
Redesigned operating process and execution framework
Defined initial PRD and regulation-driven requirements for vision biomarker analysis software

experience.role: AI PM / New Business Team Lead
highlights: Won 13 enterprise clients in Japan (including Mitsubishi and AEON)
Delivered +100% YoY revenue growth and +256% sales touchpoints

education: Tsinghua University, B.A. Journalism (Media Statistics), GPA 3.78/4.0
achievements: ElevenLabs Chroma Awards 2025 Sponsor Award Top 11 Finalist
